name: dayjs
summary: 2KB immutable date time library alternative to Moment.js with the same modern API

story.problem:
English | 简体中文 | 日本語 | Português Brasileiro | 한국어 | Español (España) | Русский | Türkçe | සිංහල | עברית

Fast 2kB alternative to Moment.js with the same modern API

    
    
    
    
    
    
    
        
    

> Day.js is a minimalist JavaScript library that parses, validates, manipulates, and displays dates and times for modern browsers with a largely Moment.js-compatible API. If you use Moment.js, you already know how to use Day.js.

``js
dayjs().startOf('month').add(1,…
story.when_to_use: Use dayjs when you need 2kb immutable date time library alternative to moment.js with the same modern api.

nodes.label: dayjs
nodes.summary: Top-level module. Import as `import dayjs` or `from dayjs import ...`
